linear_transfers: SSA renaming only
invalidators: Matching root release or generation replacement
forbidden_producers: Address, machine counter, metadata, validator, fact

linear_transfers: Copy within the same root and layout epoch
invalidators: Relayout or release
forbidden_producers: Address, index, handle, page number, writer proposition

linear_transfers: Exact split and join only
invalidators: Relayout or release
forbidden_producers: Unknown-overlap assertion, solver result, metadata

binding: native bytes and ordinary value provenance
linear_transfers: Ordinary value movement
invalidators: Ordinary overwrite or source lifetime end
forbidden_producers: May never create owner, validity, strict edge, loan, retirement, quiescence, or release

linear_transfers: Move, store, return, or escrow without duplication
invalidators: Destroy, transfer into Live, abort
forbidden_producers: Address, metadata, validator, classifier, fact

linear_transfers: Move or escrow only
invalidators: Successful terminal release
forbidden_producers: Address, wrapper, handle identity, page number, metadata, validator

linear_transfers: Move and escrow only
invalidators: Successful terminal release
forbidden_producers: Metadata, address, validator, classifier, state successor, fact

linear_transfers: Take, destroy, forget, reclassify, split, and join preserve lineage
invalidators: Checked initialization, adoption, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Zero bits, allocator success without a root, metadata, validator, fact

linear_transfers: Exact overwrite, split, join, read, and checked reinitializer preserve lineage
invalidators: Forget to Vacant, typed adoption, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Allocator success alone, generic read error, metadata, validator, fact

kind: typed live value in a place
linear_transfers: Take, replace, swap, relocate, reclassify, and owner-preserving successor
invalidators: Destroy, owner take, overlapping transition, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Metadata, address, integer index, writer predicate, validator, fact

linear_transfers: Exact product, sum, span, split, join, state transition, and whole-root relayout
invalidators: Any untracked overlapping store, incomplete join, or release
forbidden_producers: Metadata, validator, address, project recognition

linear_transfers: Shared handle movement under unchanged publication and root hold
invalidators: Unpublish or close under exact protocol, interference invalidation, release
forbidden_producers: Copied address, guard presence, metadata, fact

binding: target root, publication lineage, complete ingress-set identity
linear_transfers: Successful atomic publish, take, replace, or compare-exchange while preserving the complete ingress identity; Subowner publication is a lineage-preserving transfer
invalidators: Terminal transfer, retirement conversion after ClosedIngress, abort
forbidden_producers: Failed CAS, copied bits, address, successful unlink alone, writer unreachability assertion

linear_transfers: Fragment-local transitions and exact move
invalidators: Matching join, terminal disposition, abort
forbidden_producers: Address, page metadata, heap association, backpointer lookup

binding: domain,target root,set identity,Open or Closed structural leaves,slot generations
linear_transfers: K2 sealing plus exact slot-bound Open-to-Closed or ingress-move transitions
invalidators: ClosedIngress elimination into Retired, target withdrawal, abort
forbidden_producers: Successful CAS alone, address, copied pointer, policy name, partial edge set, writer reachability or unreachability assertion

linear_transfers: Consumed predecessor to successor with unchanged owner multiset
invalidators: Overlapping raw metadata or payload write, focus, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Decoder result, metadata bits, validator, project recognition

linear_transfers: Empty, push, pop, splice, and fixed adoption consume predecessors
invalidators: Raw head or next mutation, node reclassification, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Non-null address, place key, pointer decode, scan result

linear_transfers: Move and exact profile-preserving generation advance
invalidators: Registry mutation outside profile, domain close, release
forbidden_producers: Guard, epoch integer, address, policy name, writer invariant

linear_transfers: None; payload loan may inherit a shorter scope
invalidators: Scope end, parent transition, epsilon change, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Metadata, address, decoder, equality callback, guard

linear_transfers: Stable to Focus to Transit or Repair/Poison to successor; lineage preserved
invalidators: Commit, terminal disposition, abort
forbidden_producers: Writer protocol, callback boolean, arbitrary rollback, validator

linear_transfers: Move guard and create only nested scoped RoleViews
invalidators: Exact end-observe, abort
forbidden_producers: Guard value, address, epoch copy, unregistered pin

linear_transfers: Move or convert to gated Disposition/Once without re-rooting
invalidators: Terminal disposition after matching Quiescent, abort
forbidden_producers: Address, failed or isolated unlink, guard, epoch integer, metadata, partial ingress set

linear_transfers: Explicit reborrow into same or shorter scope
invalidators: Scope end, parent-consuming transition, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Place descriptor, address, metadata, index, guard

linear_transfers: Move through sealed calls and exact next steps without increasing obligations
invalidators: Commit, repair, poison, structured close, abort
forbidden_producers: Writer state relation, callback result alone, implicit rollback

linear_transfers: Move unchanged, structural reduction, or conversion of Retired lineage
invalidators: Terminal action before obligation removal completes, abort
forbidden_producers: Arbitrary finalizer, destructor name, validator, address

linear_transfers: Share within the same immutable cutoff/domain proof; later frontier or registry activity cannot revive a closed target
invalidators: Terminal domain destruction after all target rights close
forbidden_producers: Guard, epoch integer, individual observation token, partial scan, writer predicate, quiescence leaf

kind: sealed reusable or affine once callable
linear_transfers: Reusable invocation under shared rules or affine Once transfer/enqueue
invalidators: Consume-before-invoke, normal capture disposition, abort
forbidden_producers: Raw function pointer, raw bytes, unsafe send promise, project identity

linear_transfers: No safety-authority consumer; optimization only
invalidators: Scope end, matching state/event invalidator, relayout, release
forbidden_producers: Writer assertion; facts may never produce owner, validity, custody, observation, retirement, quiescence, or release
